sql.trim: t_enterprise.enterprise_name AS enterprise_name, t_enterprise.region AS region, t_enterprise.establishment_date AS establishment_date, t_enterprise.registered_capital AS registered_capital, t_enterprise.paid_in_capital AS paid_in_capital, t_enterprise.employee_count AS employee_count, t_enterprise.product AS product, t_enterprise.website AS website, t_enterprise.contact_phone AS contact_phone, t_enterprise.create_by AS create_by, t_enterprise.data_source AS data_source, t_enterprise.status AS status, t_enterprise.detail AS detail, t_enterprise.dev_status AS dev_status

mapper.sql: select id, create_by, update_by, create_time, update_time, delete_flag, enterprise_name, region, establishment_date, registered_capital, paid_in_capital, employee_count, product, website, contact_phone, data_source, status, detail, dev_status from t_enterprise
mapper.insert:
insert into t_enterprise
create_by, update_by, create_time, update_time, delete_flag, enterprise_name, region, establishment_date, registered_capital, paid_in_capital, employee_count, product, website, contact_phone, data_source, status, detail, dev_status,
#{createBy}, #{updateBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{deleteFlag}, #{enterpriseName}, #{region}, #{establishmentDate}, #{registeredCapital}, #{paidInCapital}, #{employeeCount}, #{product}, #{website}, #{contactPhone}, #{dataSource}, #{status}, #{detail}, #{devStatus},
